X0800_CRCTN_NUM X0800_CRCTN_NUM X0800 Correction Number CHAR 2 The data in this column contains the number of correction requests to modify/inativate the existing record, including the present one. effective 10/01/2023
619 X0900A_MDFCTN_TRNSCRPT_ERR_CD X0900A_MDFCTN_TRNSCRPT_ERR_CD X0900A Reason for Modification: Transcription Error Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the reason for modification of the prior erroneous record is related to a transcription error. 0=Not checked
